title: Questions for myself
excerpt: Do you remember your childhood dreams? One nightmare very well.
body:
Do you remember your childhood dreams?
One nightmare very well

Morning shower or evening?
Evening Shower. I value clean sheets deeply

Is there anything you regret not doing?
Writing everyday

What was your first job?
Swim Instructor for children

What would you put on your tombstone?
Here she lies, with you she lives.

What would be your last meal?
Martini, oysters, medium rare steak, french fries, champagne, warm chocolate lava cake with one scoop of vanilla bean ice cream, champagne, and two Marlboro Lights. I want it all or nothing at all

What are you reading?
The Portrait of Dorian Grey

What movie have you seen the most times?
Pirates of the Caribbean and Casablanca

Thoughts on love?
Essential

What are your beauty secrets?
Eyeliner and genetics

How do you know when you've had enough?
People look at you differently

When do you get nervous?
In front of a chess board

What's living on your nightstand?
A small relic I found in France, glass of water, magnesium spray, and whatever book I'm reading

Favorite thing about the city you live in?
It's extreme and at this very moment in my life extreme makes sense to me

What makes you smile?
Taking a good photo and writing a great sentence

Have you been kicked out anywhere?
Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel and a Mexican restaurant in Burbank

What keeps you here?
A desire to see and feel more
